title: ZXBrick

hero.alt: ZX Series arcade game collection featuring ZX Snake, ZX Brick and ZX Space

shortDescription: A classic brick-breaking arcade game with power-ups, themes, achievements, and BarkinMad Coins.
description: ZXBrick is part of the [ZX Series](/zx-series), a retro-inspired brick-breaking arcade game featuring 100 handcrafted levels, powerful upgrades, achievements, unlockable themes, BarkinMad Coins, and fast-paced gameplay inspired by the golden age of arcade gaming.
features: BarkinMad Coins earned through ZX Series gameplay

barkinMadCoins.description: Earn [BarkinMad Coins](/zx-series) through gameplay across the ZX Series. Your coins are stored in a shared wallet and will unlock additional content as new ZX Series games and updates are released. Coins have no cash value and can only be earned by playing.

faq.question: Is ZXBrick part of the ZX Series?
faq.answer: Yes. ZXBrick is part of the [ZX Series](/zx-series), sharing the wider arcade ecosystem with games such as [ZXSnake](/apps/zxsnake), [ZXSpace](/apps/zxspace), and [ZXPong](/apps/zxpong).

faq.question: How many levels does ZXBrick include?
faq.answer: ZXBrick includes 100 handcrafted levels with power-ups, themes, achievements, and leaderboard support.

faq.question: Does ZXBrick include BarkinMad Coins?
faq.answer: Yes. ZXBrick supports [BarkinMad Coins](/zx-series), which are earned through gameplay across the ZX Series and stored in a shared wallet for future ZX Series content.
